title: RPG better elder guardian
description: Makes the ElderGuardian a proper boss with custom attacks, increased health and special drops
body:
![main](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8dbb1ae0d2ba7863ae2fefc8ea0ecd535aaf2bd1_0.webp)

**As it says in the name this mod will make your standard Elder Guardian better. The Elder Guardian now comes with an increased health and attack and custom drops.**

![drops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa41209ceef022d4528ea5fe6334428693b20b37.png)

This new and inproved Elder Guardian will also have a few special attacks like summoning guardians, surrounding itsself with explosive sea mines and teleporting the player to itself.
![thingy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9260b4f70a4530765175cd8c9d6cfa37473a93f8.png)

there are also new special weapons and relics that are obtained from the boss drops.
![weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44083269f5044577fedff372fd53b4d0b348e9e7.png)
![relics](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0988fc1a8eae41c32e5b1e873fcf4ee6640e1864_0.webp)
![thingy_2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/141f57b55e039c174458f63af471a7707ad26c84.png)

1.20.1 + are the most updated versions

Two new blocks were also added.



For questions you are free to ask in the comments

FAQ:

want to use this mod in your pack?: of course you can, i hope it elevates your experience



Thanks for playing with this mod :)
